kit_name: OntoGuard Boundary Proof Kit - Public Sanitized
ip_positioning: Protected by U.S. Patent Application 19/444,521 - Track I prioritized examination granted May 2026.
public_safety_boundaries: No source code or protected implementation logic.
No private ontology internals, raw legal/citation registries, protected scoring formulas, or customer data.
The single-event proof is a public-safe sanitized financial-services governance case.
The controlled batch is a synthetic controlled-corridor proof surface and not customer production data.
Event-level execution-boundary and no-bind proof is shown; production L5 non-bypassability is not asserted.
Learning signals are review-gated candidates; no live training, model-weight update, ontology mutation, policy mutation, or Decision API mutation is performed.
what_this_proves: Semantic projection and Decision Projection explain candidate states without overriding the selected authorized state.
The current selected projection matches the Decision API action ESCALATE.
Underlying score preference divergence is disclosed separately from Decision API parity.
Coherent Governance Loading explains why the autonomous release threshold was not met.
Batch projection preserves per-case outcomes and summarizes mixed controlled-corridor posture.

single_event_semantic_projection.read_only_policy: Projection and governance loading explain the authoritative Decision API result; they do not mutate decision, release, trust, risk, benchmark, policy, evidence, routing, citations, or trace.

batch_semantic_projection_public_summary.buyer_summary: Semantic Projection summarizes what governed outcomes the controlled batch attempted and why the aggregate selected state won without overriding per-case Decision API outcomes.
limitations: This aggregate readout summarizes governed controlled test cases. It does not claim production deployment, client-specific operating policy, measured reviewer compression, measured loss prevention, or automatic model retraining until pilot feedback is attached.

decision_api_preservation_statement: Projection is explanatory only. The authoritative Decision API action, release authorization, routing, no-bind result, and evidence state are preserved.
